title.text: Manual Email campaigns on the platform

body:0001.text: What are manual emails on the platform?

body:0002.text: The “Messaging” tab in the admin panel allows you to create, edit, and track email campaigns sent to users. You can design campaigns, send them to specific user groups, test and preview emails, and analyze engagement metrics.

body:0003.text: In the "Messaging" tab you find both Custom Emails and Automatic Emails. This article is about Custom Emails, for more information about Automatic Emails read this support article.

body:0006.text: Communicate important updates or calls to action

body:0007.text: Target specific user groups (e.g., participants of a single project)

body:0008.text: Personalize messages using variables like ####{{first_name}} and ####{{last_name}}

body:0009.text: Learn and improve based on open rates and click-through statistics

body:0010.text: There are two types of manual emails:

body:0011.text: Platform-level manual emails: only accessible by admins to send emails to different user groups or all registered users on the platform.

body:0012.text: accessible via the Messaging general tab > Custom emails

body:0013.text: Project-level custom emails: accessible by project managers to send emails to only their project participants

body:0015.text: How to create an email campaign?

body:0017.text: Go to Messaging > Create a new email.

body:0018.text: Define the sender (person name or organization).

body:0019.text: Define the recipients: choose “all users” or a specific smart group (e.g., participants of a project).

body:0020.text: ℹ️ You cannot add individual email addresses here. Users must belong to a group.

body:0021.text: Define reply handling: who will receive replies.

body:0022.text: Add your email subject (make it clear, engaging, and personal).

body:0023.text: Write the email body. Add layout, images, hyperlinks, and personalization tokens like ####{{first_name}} and ####{{last_name}}.

body:0024.text: Remember: the header (platform logo) and footer (legal info) are fixed.

body:0025.text: If your platform is multilingual, fill in all language fields.

body:0027.text: Your draft can be reviewed, edited, and tested before sending.

body:0031.text: ℹ️ From the Project Messaging tab you can only email all project participants.

body:0032.text: Define reply handling: who will receive replies.

body:0033.text: Add your email subject (make it clear, engaging, and personal).

body:0034.text: Write the email body. Add layout, images, hyperlinks, and personalization tokens like ####{{first_name}} and ####{{last_name}}.

body:0035.text: If your platform is multilingual, fill in all language fields.

body:0037.text: Your draft can be reviewed, edited, and tested before sending.

body:0038.text: How to preview, edit and test your email campaigns?

body:0039.text: After saving as draft, click Edit to preview the email

body:0040.text: Click Send me a test email to send the campaign to yourself

body:0041.text: Resize images by clicking and dragging from the corners

body:0045.text: create a new email and save the draft email

body:0046.text: go back to your list of all emails and press Edit on the draft you created

body:0047.text: next to the Send button, press the down arrow to open the open to schedule the email

body:0048.text: set the time and date it should be sent

body:0049.text: you can edit the scheduled time or cancel the scheduling by pressing again on the down arrow

body:0050.text: Email scheduling only applies to manual emails in the Messaging tab of projects and admin panel - it does not apply to automatic emails that have their own trigger

body:0059.text: A list of recipients with individual status

body:0060.text: 💡Use these insights to refine future campaigns.

body:0062.text: From: Display name in the “From” field (person or organization)

body:0063.text: To: Which smart group or user set will receive the email

body:0064.text: Replies Should Go To: Recipient for email replies

body:0065.text: Email Subject: The subject line in recipients’ inboxes

body:0066.text: Email Body: The main content area. Supports images, hyperlinks, and personalization tokens

body:0067.text: Header & Footer: Logo (header) and legal info (footer) are automatically added
